---
author: Daniel Amieva Rodriguez
title: "Senior Data Engineer"
format:
  classic-cv-pdf: 
    linestretch: 1.25
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=30mm
      - left=20mm
      - right=20mm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \setlength{\parskip}{6pt}
        \widowpenalty=10000
        \clubpenalty=10000
        \raggedbottom
cvfooter:
  left: "`r Sys.Date()`"
  right: "github.com/dar4datascience"
cvcolor: 4b0082
cvfont: comfortaa
cvmeta:
  - title: Contact
    left: "linkedin.jobs.frequent526@passmail.net"
    right: "Mexico City, Mexico"
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Summary

6+ years engineering scalable data pipelines across AWS, GCP, and multi-cloud environments. Expert in Python scripting (modular packages, automation), advanced SQL (ETL design, query tuning, data modeling), and end-to-end pipeline architecture. Proven track record of cutting costs and accelerating delivery by owning projects autonomously — from architecture to CI/CD deployment. Strong communicator who bridges technical depth with business clarity.

# Skills

**Languages and Frameworks:** Python, SQL, R, dbt, Airflow, Docker, Quarto, Terraform, Snowflake

**Cloud & Platforms:** AWS (Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, DMS), GCP (BigQuery, Dataform, Cloud Composer), Azure, Cloudera

**SCM, Build, CI/CD:** GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Git, Jira, Confluence

**Other:** ETL/ELT Pipeline Design, Data Modeling, OOP, REST APIs, Kafka, Spark, DuckDB, Data Governance, Agile

# Relevant Employment History

## TeamStation AI, Senior Data Engineer | 2024 - Present

**Data Lake Architecture with Python ETL Packages**

Architected a medallion data lake (bronze/silver/gold) from scratch using Python custom packages and AWS serverless stack (Glue, Step Functions, Lambda, DMS streaming). Replaced Spark-heavy jobs with DuckDB + Lambda architecture, achieving significant cost and performance improvements. Implemented comprehensive CI/CD automation and created AI-enhanced documentation for team knowledge sharing.

**Activities and responsibilities:**

- Architected medallion data lake (bronze/silver/gold) using Python custom packages, AWS Glue, Step Functions, and Lambda; replaced Spark-heavy jobs with DuckDB + Lambda, reducing compute costs ~40% and processing time by ~60% vs. equivalent Glue cluster approach
- Automated ETL deployment via GitHub Actions CI/CD, eliminating ~200 hrs/year of manual release work and enabling same-day data pipeline iteration
- Authored AI-enhanced Quarto technical docs covering Step Functions, Lambdas, and custom Python packages for team onboarding; designed modular Python ETL packages (reused across 3+ pipelines) with NLQ querying over Snowflake schema

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, AWS Glue, Step Functions, Lambda, DMS, DuckDB, GitHub Actions, Snowflake, Quarto, SAM IaC

## Rackspace Technology, Business Intelligence Engineer IV | 2022 - 2024

**Enterprise ETL Automation & API Integration**

Built comprehensive Python ETL pipelines programmatically executing SQL against BigQuery, connecting 10+ enterprise APIs including Azure Monitor SDK, LeanIX OData, ServiceNow, SharePoint, and Power BI. Developed the AskHR pipeline that ran hourly with zero manual intervention, enabling automated HR analytics. Onboarded team members to automation systems and mentored peers on GitHub workflows and deployment best practices.

**Power BI CI/CD Pipeline (Self-Starter Initiative)**

Independently identified a critical gap in the deployment process and designed an end-to-end Power BI CI/CD pipeline from scratch using Python, GitHub Actions, and Azure AD service principals. No prior pipeline existed for the organization's 90+ dashboards across 70+ workspaces. Self-navigated Azure AD group setup across multiple teams to establish proper service principal permissions. Cut deployment time from 60 minutes to 2 minutes, saving approximately 3 workdays of manual migration effort per release cycle.

**SQL Optimization & Data Governance**

Led BigQuery SQL performance tuning initiative and comprehensive decommissioning of stale assets including obsolete machines, data sources, and dashboards. Identified revenue leakage from development environment resources running in production. Implemented data governance policies and validation procedures for workspace and Jira hygiene. Estimated annual cost savings of USD 500,000 from optimization and asset cleanup efforts.

**Activities and responsibilities:**

- Built Python ETL pipelines programmatically executing SQL against BigQuery — connecting 10+ enterprise APIs (Azure Monitor SDK, LeanIX OData, SNOW, SharePoint, Power BI); AskHR pipeline ran hourly with zero manual intervention; onboarded team to automation systems and mentored peers on GitHub + deployment workflows
- Independently identified gap, designed, and shipped end-to-end Power BI CI/CD (Python + GitHub Actions + Azure AD service principals) for 90+ dashboards across 70+ workspaces — no prior pipeline existed; self-navigated Azure AD group setup across teams; cut deployment from 60 min to 2 min, saving ~3 workdays of manual effort
- Led BigQuery SQL performance tuning and stale asset decommissioning (machines, data sources, dashboards) — identified revenue leakage, with estimated annual cost savings of USD 500,000

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, BigQuery, GitHub Actions, Power BI, Azure AD, Azure Monitor SDK, LeanIX, ServiceNow, SharePoint, Dataform, Tableau, Jira

## Baz Super App, Senior BI Engineer | 2021 - 2022

**Cross-Cloud Data Streaming & Marketing ETL**

Led sensitive financial data replication from AWS to BigQuery via Kafka streaming pipeline, requiring extensive coordination across security, cloud, and data teams to ensure compliant, real-time data availability. Built and automated a Python ETL pipeline ingesting CleverTap marketing event data into BigQuery, scheduled via GitHub Actions cron jobs. Designed end-to-end data reporting pipeline for marketing campaigns, delivering automated dashboards that replaced manual report generation for the marketing team.

**Activities and responsibilities:**

- Led sensitive financial data replication from AWS to BigQuery via a Kafka streaming pipeline — required coordinating across security, cloud, and data teams to ensure compliant, real-time data availability
- Built and automated a Python ETL pipeline ingesting CleverTap marketing event data into BigQuery, scheduled via GitHub Actions cron — enabling self-serve marketing campaign reporting with zero manual extraction
- Designed end-to-end data reporting pipeline for marketing campaigns on BigQuery, delivering automated dashboards that replaced manual report generation for the marketing team

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, BigQuery, Kafka, AWS, GCP, GitHub Actions, CleverTap, Cloudera, Looker, Cloud Composer

## DiDi Food, Data Engineer | BI Lead | 2020 - 2021

**Spark SQL Optimization & Analytics Automation**

Tuned Spark SQL jobs via Python profiling and computation choke-point debugging, achieving 40% reduction in job execution time and improved data quality reliability at scale. Parameterized and automated SQL queries previously run manually by business users, saving approximately 100+ analyst hours per quarter and eliminating ad-hoc reporting bottlenecks. Maintained data governance policies ensuring integrity across customer experience analytics pipelines spanning SQL Server and AWS sources.

**Activities and responsibilities:**

- Tuned Spark SQL jobs via Python profiling and computation choke-point debugging, achieving 40% reduction in job execution time and improved data quality reliability at scale
- Parameterized and automated SQL queries previously run manually by business users, saving ~100+ analyst hours/quarter and eliminating ad-hoc reporting bottlenecks
- Maintained data governance policies ensuring integrity across CX analytics pipelines (SQL Server + AWS sources)

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, Spark, AWS, AWS Athena, AWS Glue, AWS S3, Airflow, dbt, Tableau, SQL Server, GitLab, Linux

# Certifications

- **LLM Engineering with Structured Outputs:** Weights and Biases | 2025
- **CI/CD for Machine Learning (GitOps):** Weights and Biases | 2024
- **Azure AI Fundamentals:** Microsoft | 2024
- **Applying Machine Learning and AI Services on AWS:** Cloud Academy | 2023
- **Engineer Data in Google Cloud:** Google | 2023

# Education

- **Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico** | 2019 - 2020 | Specialization, Data Science
- **Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico** | 2015 - 2021 | Bachelors, Economics
